title: Featureously Optimized
description: Speedy Graphics, Fast Performance, and Enhanced Features and a lot of utility in One Seamless Pack.
body:
![Featureously Optimized](https://s6.imgcdn.dev/YlnNId.png)


[![Github](https://img.shields.io/badge/Github-Source_Code-lightgrey?style=for-the-badge&logo=github)](https://github.com/AkshajxGit/Featureously-Optimized) [![Curseforge](https://img.shields.io/badge/My-projects-orange?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge)](https://www.curseforge.com/members/akshajcurseforge/projects)

![ABOUT THE PACK](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/723a5ebacb33060c67b63c6773be6d105b02cf6c_0.webp)

### About the Pack 

Featureously Optimized began as a personal Minecraft instance, I tuned and refined until it struck the perfect balance between smooth performance and immersive visuals. Over time, it evolved into a complete modpack that brings together powerful optimizations, stunning shader support and carefully chosen resource packs. With shaders and resource packs embedded in the modpack and a polished set of quality-of-life improvements, this pack ensures you can explore, build, and go on a adventure with both efficiency and style.

![FEATURES](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94216c5b1aa408ede5e455c3fa3d22c9a967e2d3_0.webp)

### Features

Featureously Optimized has a lot of amazing features like a built-in calculator,browser,notepad, and a lot more like shader support via Iris and modded resource pack support via Polytone, EMF, ETF and more. Head on over to the Gallery to see some of the many features in this modpack. 

- Freelook & Freecam: New perspectives for building, exploring, and recording.

- Flashback: Replay and cinematic recording tools.
  
**NOTE: Freelook is banned on PvP Servers like Hypixel,etc. as it gives you a advantage to look at your opponents while bridging.**
